titleStmt.title: SII 28.107: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 107. (A.R. No. 262 of 1913.) ŚIṄGĀRATTŌPPU (NEAR CHIDAMBARAM), CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

p.hi: Parakēsarivarman Tribhuvanachchakkaravartti Śrī-Kulōttuṅga-chōḻa III Year 2, Day 125.

summary.p: The record is prefaced by the meykkīrtti, puyal vāyttu etc., of the king. It records a royal order concerning plots of land purchased in the name of the deities Tiruttoṇḍattogai-īśvaram-uḍaiya-mādēvar, Arumoḻi-Īśvaramuḍaiya-mādēvar as also of Subrahmaṇṇiya-ppiḷḷaiyar whose shrine had been set up inside the premises of the lost mentioned temple. Those lands were paying the land-tax (iṟai-kkaṭṭukk uḍalāna, iṟuppukk-uḍalāna). in respect of graded (taram-peṟṟa) and ungraded (taram-ili) lands. There is also reference to maḍakku-nilam, the significance of which is however not clear (it appears to have signified a computed reckoning of the extent of land for assessment purpose). The persons from whom the plots of land were purchased, the situation of such plots and their extent are also given in detail. It was decided that the plots graded upto the eighth (from the top would pay the tax as on eighth grade. Plots which were below this grade would pay tax as per grade as they were paying till then. For this purpose, the land of Subrahmaṇṇiya-ppiḷḷaiyar was clubbed together with that of Arumōḻi-īśvaram-uḍaiyār. The Mūla-parushaiyār of Perumbaṟṟappuliyūr, a taniyūr of Rājādhirāja-vaḷanāḍu took cognisance of this order for execution. It was also ordered that the land-sites of the śrīkōyil, tiru-muṟṟam, tirumaḍaiviḷāgam and sacred tank (tīrttha-kkuḷam), which seem to have been taxed till then would be exempted from this obligation thereafter.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . puyal vāyttu vaḷam perukap poyyāta nāṉmaṟaiyiṉ ceyalvāt tirumakaḷuñ ceyamakaḷuñ ciṟantuvāḻa veṇma
koṭai viḷaṅka vel ventaraṭi vaṇaṅka maṇmaṭantai maṉaṅkaḷippa maṉuniti taḻaittoṅkac cakkaramuñ ceṅkolun
ñcelanaṭa ṟpa kālam puvi kākka poṟpamainta muṭipuṉaintu cempoṉ virasiṅṅāsanattu puvaṉa muḻutuṭaiyā
viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakesari paṟmarāna tribhuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu Iraṇṭāvatu nā
rupattaiñciṉāl Irājādhirāja vaḷanāṭṭut taṉiyūr perumpaṟṟappuliyūr mulaparuṣaiyār Eḻuttu nammur nilam Aḷa A
perumakkaḷum nala
kai Īśvaramuṭaiya mādevarkkum Arumoḻi Īśvaramuṭaiya mādevaṟkum Ikkoyilil Eḻuntaruḷi Irukkum suppiramaṇṇiya
ḷaiyārkkum nammūr nilattu Ikoyil tevarkaḷ tirunāmattu vilaikoṇṭu Iṟuppukkuṭalāy varukiṟa nilaṅkaḷum nām Ittevaṟku Iṟupa
pukku nilaṅkaḷum Ikkoyilkaḷil Arumoḻi Īśvaramuṭaiyār koyilil Eḻuntaruḷi Irukkum suppiramaṇṇiya piḷḷaiyār tirunāmattu
nilam Arumoḻi Īśvaramuṭaiyār civanāmattileyum kūṭṭi Innilattukku Eṭṭāntarattukku meṟpaṭṭa taram Eṭṭān tarattile Iṟukkavu
m Ittarattukkun tāḻ Iṟuttu varukiṟa nilaṅkaḷ muṉpu Iṟuttu varukiṟa taraṅkaḷile Iṟukkavum tiruttoṇṭat tokai Īśvaramuṭaiyār śrī
koyilum tirumuṟṟamum tirumaṭaiviḷākamum tītta kuḷamumāna nilam muṉpu Iṟaikkaṭṭukkuṭalāṉa paṭi tavira nammur niṅkalukkuṭalāka ni
kkakkaṭavatākavum tiruvāymoḻintaruḷa prasādañ ceytaruḷiṉa tirumukam vantamaiyil Ittevarkaḷil tirukkaḷāñceṭi mātevar va
ṭu Iṟuppāy varukiṟa Aṉupokappaṭi Āttiraiyaṉ civaṉkāri pirāmaṇi perāl pottakam peṟṟa nilamāy Uḻaiccāṇaṉ capāpati Iravi perāl I
kuntavaivatikku meṟku kaṇṭāratitta vākkālukkut teṟku mutal kaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟ catirattu taram peṟṟa nila mukkāl muntirikai kiḻ muṉṟumāvum taram
muntirikaikkiḻaraiye muṉṟu mākkāṇiyum vācciyaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ niṟaṇi pavaḻakkuṉṟu pakkal vi
ṟpaṭiyāṉ perāl Iṟuppāy varukiṟa taram peṟṟa nilam nālumā mukkāṇi Araikkāṇi kiḻ mukkālum tarammili nilam Iraṇṭu
māmukkāṇi muntirikaikkiḻ Oṉpatumā Araikkāṇiyum ma kuṭikkaviciyaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ poṉnampalattāṭi perāl pottakam peṟṟu A
ṉupokamāy kāmakkaṉ pālainākan peril Iṟuppāy varukiṟa taram peṟṟa nilam kāle muntirikaikkiḻ Eṭṭumāvum taramili nilam Araikkāṇi muntirikaikkiḻ
mukkālum veḷḷaṟaik kaviciyaṉ pirammaṇiya tevan piramaṇṇiyatevaṉ perāl pottakam peṟṟu Aṉupokamāy Ivaṉperil Iṟuppāy varu
kiṟa tarampeṟṟa nilam kāle muntirikai kiḻ Eṭṭu māvum taramili nilam muntirikaikkiḻ Aṟumā Arai (arai)kkāṇiyum kaviciyaṉ civaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamu
ṭaiyāṉ pakkal vilaikoṇṭu Aṉupokamāy Uḻaiccāṇaṉ capāpati Iravi peril Iṟuppāy varukiṟa kuntavai vatikku meṟku Irājarāja vāykkālukku
t teṟku muṉṟāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟ catirattu taram peṟṟa nilam Aṟumā Araikkāṇik kiḻkkāle Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyum vācciyaṉ Aṅkicuvaraṉ pirāmaṇi tattaṉ pe
pottakam peṟṟu Aṉupokamāy Ivaḷ perāl Iṟuppāy varukiṟa Ulokamātevivatikku meṟku kaṇṭarātitta vāykkālukkut teṟku nā

lāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟ catirattu taram peṟṟa nilam mummā Araiyiṉ kiḻkkālum taramili nilam kāṇiyum kavi yaṉ naṭṭaṉ perāl pottakam peṟṟu Aṉu
pokamāy Uḻaiccāṇaṉ capāpati Iravi perāl Iṟuppāy varukiṟa meṟpaṭi vati vāykkālāka Āṟāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu taram peṟṟa nilam Irumā Araiyum vācciyaṉ paṭṭaṉ
kārikāḷi perāl pottakam peṟṟu vācciyaṉ kumaraṉ pāṇi perāl Iṟuppāy varukiṟa pañcavaṉ mātevivatikku meṟku kaṇṭarātitta vāykkālukkut teṟku mutaṟkaṇ
ṇāṟṟu Iraṇṭāñ catirattu taram peṟṟa nilam Araiye nālumāvum vācciyaṉ kumaraṉ pāṇi perāl pottakam peṟṟu Ivaṉ perāl Iṟuppāy varukiṟa kuntavai
vatikku meṟku Irājarāja vāykkālukku teṟku nālāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu munṟāñ catirattu taram peṟṟa nilam muṉtirikaikkiḻ nālumākkāṇi Araik kāṇiyum Uḻaiccāṇaṉ
vāsudevaṉ mātevaṉ pirāmaṇi tantan tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ perāl pottakam peṟṟu vācciyaṉ kumaraṉ pāṇi perāl Iṟuppāy varukiṟa taram pe
ṟṟa nilam Araiye nāṉmāva kāṇi kiḻ Eṭṭu māvum taramili nilam mukkāle Iraṇṭu māṅkāṇi Araikkāṇi muttirikai kiḻ Oṉpatu mākkāṇiyum
karāl tarampeṟṟa nilamā ttevaṟku kam pilā polu Iṟuppāy varukiṟa pottakappa nilam nāle Iraṇṭu mākkāṇi
Itil taramili nilam Oṉṟe mākāṇi muntirikai kiḻaraiye muṉṟumāk kāṇi Araikkāṇi nikkittaram peṟṟa nilam muṉṟe Orumā muntirikaikkiḻ mukkā
l maṭakku nilam Orumā Araikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻ Orumāvum I[pperkaḷil kuṟaittu Ittevar tirunāmattuṭaṉ Iṟukkavum Iṉnilattil Eṭṭān taramumā
ntarattukku meṟpaṭṭa taraṅkaḷ nilam Iraṇṭaraiye kāṇi Araikāṇikkiḻ Araiye Iraṇṭu māviṉāl maṭakku nilam Oru mā Araikkāṇik kiḻ nāṉ mā A
(a)raikkāṇiyum Eṭṭāṉ taram Ākki Ittevar civa nāmattu Iṟuppuk koḷḷum nilam kāṇi Araikāṇikkiḻ Āṟumā muntirikaiyum kiḻpaṭṭa taraṅka
ḷāl nilam Araiye Araimā Araikkāṇikkiḻ Eṭṭumā mukkāṇi Araikkāṇiyiṉāl maṭakku nilam kiḻmukkakāle mākāṇi muntirikaikkiḻ Orumā Arai Arai
kkāṇi muntirikai Āka Iṟuppukkuṭalāṉa maṭakku nilam Araikkāṇi muntirikaikkiḻ Iraṇṭu mākkāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikai Ittevar civanāmatte Iṟuppukkuṭalāka koḷḷavum nikki nilam Arai
mā Araikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻmukkāle mummā Arai Araikkāṇiyum tarattuṇṭattāl Ittevar tirunāmatte kuṟaiyavum Arumoḻi Īśvarammuṭaiyaār civanāma
ttāl Iṟuppāy varukiṟa nilam Araiye kiḻ Eḻumā Araiyum Ittevar koyilil Eḻuntaruḷi Irukkum subramaṇṇiya piḷḷaiyār civanāmattāl pottakam peṟṟu Iṟuppā
y varukiṟa nilamāy Ittevar civanāmattuṭaṉ tirumukam paṭi kūṭṭum taram peṟṟa nilam Oṉṟe nān mā Arai Araikkāṇikkiḻ Araiye māk A
raikkāṇi muntirikaiyum taramili nilam muṉṟu mākkāṇi muntirakaik kiḻ Oṉpatu māmukkāṇiyum Ippiḷḷaiyār Uḻaiccāṇaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyā m
palattiḻutiṉ pakkal vilaikoṇṭu veḷḷaṟaik kaviciyaṉ Aṅki tirunaṭṭaperumāḷ perāl Iṟuppāy varukiṟa pañcavaṉmātevivatikku meṟku
coḻakulacuntara vāykkālukkut teṟku Āṟāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟ catarattu taramili nilam kāṇi muntirikaik kiḻ mukkāle nālumā Araikkāṇiyum taram
peṟṟa nilam mukkāṇi Araikkāṇiyum māṭalattāyaṉ civaṉ pakkal vilai koṇṭu Aṉupavittu varukiṟa tarampeṟṟa nilam Iraṇṭu māvum vācciya
ṉ koṟṟaṉ pāṇṭaṉ pakkal viṟṟu koṇṭa pañcavaṉ mātevivatikku meṟku Uttamacoḻa vāykkālukkut teṟku mutaṟkaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟcati
tu vākkāl vilaikoṇṭa nilam muntirikaikkiḻ Āṟumā Arai Araik kāṇiyum Āka Arumoḻi Īśvaramuṭaiyār tirunāmattālum piḷḷaiyār tirunāmattā
m niṉṟum kūṭṭum nilam ma ṭi nilam Iraṇṭe mummā Arai Araikkāṇi muntirikaikkiḻ Araiye munṟumā mukkāṇi Itiṟ taramili nilam mummā A�
kkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻ Eṭṭumā mukkāṇi Araik kāṇi nikki taram peṟṟa nilam Iraṇṭe kiḻkkāliṉāl taramaṭakki nilam mukkāṇikkiḻ mummā Arai Araikkāṇiyum Itil Eṭṭāntaramum Eṭṭāntarattukku meṟpaṭṭa taraṅkaḷālum nilam Oṉṟai mukkāle mukkāṇik kiḻmukkāle nālumākkāṇiyiṉāl maṭakku nilam Araimā Araikkāṇi muntirikaikkiḻ mukkāle Iraṇṭu(raṇṭu) mā muntirikaiyiṉā(ā)l Eṭṭān taram nikki nilam Ittevar civanāmattāl I
ṟuppukkoḷḷum nilam kāṇikkiḻ Oṉpatumā Araiyum kiḻppaṭṭa taraṅkaḷul nilam nālumā Araikkāṇi muntirikaikkiḻkkāle Araimā Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyiṉāl maṭakku nilam kaḻaRead kīḻAṟumā Araiyiṉkiḻ mukkāle Iraṇṭumā Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyum Āka Iṟuppukkuk koḷḷu nilam kāṇik kiḻmukkāle Orumā Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyum Ittevarc civanāmattāl Iṟuppukkoḷḷavum nikki tarattuṇṭattāl kuṟaiyum nilam kāṇi
Araikkāṇi muntirikaikkiḻ Eḻumā Arai Itil muṉpu Ittevaṟku Aṟcaṉaikku viṭṭuk kuṟainta nilam muntirikai nikki kuṟaiyum nilam kāṇi Araikkāṇikkiḻ Eḻumā Araiyum tarattuṇṭattāl kuṟaiyum tiruttoṇṭat tokai Īramuṭaiya nāyaṉār śrīkoyilum tirumuṟṟamum tirumaṭaiviḷākamum dirttakuḷamum Āka cuntaracoḻavatikku meṟku coḻakulacuntari vāykkālukkut teṟku Añcāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟ catirattu nilam Eḻumāk kāṇi Araikkāṇi Itil taram peṟṟa nila
māy Ittevar Eṭṭāntarattukku Iṟuttu varukiṟa nilam kiḻaraiye mākāṇi Ittevar tirunāmattil kuṟaiyavum Āka Ippaṭikaḷā(ra)l kuṟaiyu maṭakku nilam Orumā Araikkāṇikkiḻ mukkāle Irumā Araiyum Ittevarkaḷ tirunāmaṅkaḷile kuṟaiyakkaṭavatākavum coṉṉom Ippaṭi ceyya paṇṇukkuṟaikkum maṭakkukku pThe puḷḷi over pa is prominently marked.racātañ ceytaruḷi vanta tirumukam Iṭṭa nāḷ mutal kuṟaikkappaṇṇuka Aruḷāl Ūṟkaṇakku tillai vāḻantaṇap piriyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭik
ku Ivai vācciyaṉ ponampalattāṭi Iravi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai nakkaṉṉampalak kūttaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Uḻaiccāṇaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ poṉṉampalakkūttaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai varākkiyaṉ tevaṉ poṉnampalakkūttaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai vācciyaṉ poṉnampalakkūttaṉ caṅkaraṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai vācciyaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ kovaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai vaṭukaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku kūṭṭapperumakkaḷukku Āka Uḻaiccāṇaṉ tirucciṟ
ṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ nampaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai veḷḷaṟaik kaviciyaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ kumaraṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai vācciyaṉ Iḷaiya tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ kovaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 28.107 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
